description: Wait for semantic browser readiness using bounded DOM, route, network-adjacent, overlay, and element-state signals.
known_limitations: Does not infer application-specific readiness unless a site adapter supplies hints.

description: Resolve targets through deterministic selector, test id, ARIA, label, placeholder, text, id, name, CSS, and XPath candidates.
known_limitations: Closed shadow roots and canvas-only controls require later visual capabilities.

description: Verify post-action browser effects using deterministic URL, DOM, target value, visibility, file, and text checks.
known_limitations: Semantic goal validation remains owned by V3 validation.

description: Operate native input, textarea, select, checkbox, radio, and form validation surfaces.
known_limitations: Payment and password fields require governance or handoff.

description: Operate ARIA comboboxes, autocomplete inputs, listboxes, and common custom select widgets.
known_limitations: Virtualized option lists are Wave 2.

description: Choose dates and times in native inputs and common calendar/date-picker widgets.
known_limitations: Recurring calendar event editing is Wave 2.

description: Detect and operate modals, drawers, popovers, cookie banners, and blocking overlays.
known_limitations: Nested workflow-specific dialogs may require site adapters.

description: Capture transient toast/snackbar success and error messages as execution evidence.
known_limitations: Very short-lived visual-only toasts may require Wave 3 visual support.

description: Maintain tab identity, purpose, focus, popup, close-safety, and stale-tab recovery metadata.
known_limitations: Cross-browser tab behavior is not certified in Wave 1.

description: Navigate browser history with back, forward, refresh, and route validation controls.
known_limitations: Beforeunload and unsaved-form dialogs require explicit handoff.

description: Verify file upload selection, metadata, visible filename evidence, and upload-safe policy constraints.
known_limitations: Drag-and-drop upload is Wave 3.

description: Detect, wait for, catalog, and validate browser downloads and export artifacts.
known_limitations: Browser-native print dialogs remain handoff-only.

description: Detect authentication, password, MFA, SSO, and account-selection states and request safe user handoff.
known_limitations: Agent never reads or stores credentials or OTP values.

description: Support persistent browser profile lifecycle metadata and opt-in persistent Playwright context launch.
known_limitations: Disabled by default; multi-user encrypted profile isolation is required before broad production.

description: Record browser action timings, locator strategies, verification results, recovery events, failure classes, and replay references.
known_limitations: Trace persistence is in-memory unless existing trace sinks are enabled.

description: Export deterministic browser execution timelines and metrics summaries for replay validation.
known_limitations: Replay validates traces and metadata; it does not replay live browser side effects.

description: Compute Wave 1 capability certification readiness from registry metadata, rollout, maturity, benchmarks, tests, and metrics.
known_limitations: Certification records readiness; it does not execute test suites by itself.

description: Insert and validate text in modern rich text editors including contenteditable, Quill, ProseMirror, TinyMCE, CKEditor, Draft.js, Slate, and Lexical-compatible surfaces where DOM access is available.
known_limitations: Closed shadow roots and canvas-only document editors are not part of this capability.
Editor framework private model APIs are not called directly; validation uses DOM/editor-visible evidence.

description: Set, replace, select, and validate content in Monaco editor surfaces used by GitHub, Azure DevOps, VS Code Web, and similar developer tools.
known_limitations: Requires DOM-accessible Monaco textarea or model bridge; closed iframe editors remain out of scope.

description: Set, replace, select, and validate content in CodeMirror v5 and v6 editor surfaces.
known_limitations: Private editor APIs are not required; DOM and hidden textarea bridges are preferred.

description: Perform deterministic HTML5 element and file drag/drop gestures for sortable lists, Kanban boards, and tree structures.
known_limitations: OS-level drags and native desktop drag surfaces are out of scope.

description: Detect virtualized lists and scroll intelligently to render, locate, and verify off-screen targets.
known_limitations: Does not infer server-side hidden results beyond declared scroll budget.

description: Discover and execute actions inside open and nested shadow roots with replayable composed-path metadata.
known_limitations: Closed Shadow DOM is explicitly unsupported.

description: Scroll lazy-loaded feeds with loading detection, end-of-list detection, duplicate prevention, and retry-safe termination.
known_limitations: Does not bypass authentication, rate limits, or bot-protection walls.

description: Dispatch Tab, arrows, Escape, Enter, Space, Home, End, Page Up/Down, and modifier shortcut combinations with focus validation.
known_limitations: OS-reserved shortcuts may be blocked by the browser or operating system.

description: Copy, cut, paste, and validate clipboard-compatible text and HTML using browser permission-aware fallbacks.
known_limitations: Clipboard reads require browser permission or same-page fallback evidence.

description: Detect and execute replayable coordinate-based click, hover, drag, and drawing gestures on HTML5 canvas surfaces.
known_limitations: Does not inspect canvas pixels semantically and does not perform OCR or vision reasoning.

description: Discover SVG roots, shapes, groups, and paths and execute zoom-aware coordinate interactions with validation metadata.
known_limitations: Complex semantic interpretation of diagrams is out of scope.

description: Detect browser and embedded PDF viewers and support viewer navigation, search metadata, page switching hooks, text selection hooks, and download-aware validation.
known_limitations: PDF text extraction quality depends on browser viewer DOM exposure.

description: Interact with common chart libraries including Chart.js, Highcharts, ApexCharts, ECharts, and basic D3 surfaces via hover, tooltip, point, legend, zoom, and pan primitives.
known_limitations: Does not infer business meaning from chart pixels.

description: Interact with Google Maps, Leaflet, and Mapbox surfaces using pan, zoom, marker selection, search interaction, and coordinate validation primitives.
known_limitations: Geospatial reasoning and route optimization are out of scope.

description: Control HTML5 audio and video playback with play, pause, seek, volume, fullscreen, and playback status verification.
known_limitations: Autoplay policy may block play without a browser gesture.

description: Detect image, PDF, Office, and browser-supported preview dialogs and verify preview availability without downloading or parsing private file content.
known_limitations: Office previews depend on browser or site-rendered preview DOM.

description: Capture viewport, element, and rectangular region screenshots with replay-compatible validation metadata and no OCR or visual reasoning.
known_limitations: Does not perform OCR, object detection, or vision model reasoning.

description: Site-aware adapter profile for Google Docs, Sheets, Drive, and Gmail with reliable discovery, rich editor, large table, preview, compose, recovery, validation, replay, and observability metadata.
known_limitations: Does not bypass Google account restrictions, CAPTCHA, or closed document surfaces.

description: Site-aware adapter profile for Word, Excel, Outlook, OneDrive, and SharePoint with Office selectors, ribbon recovery, large table workflows, and auth-aware validation metadata.
known_limitations: Office live coauthoring state is validated through browser-visible evidence only.

description: Advanced GitHub adapter profile for pull request review, code search, issue triage, and web editor workflows using code editor and repository-aware recovery metadata.
known_limitations: Does not commit, merge, or close issues without separate governance approval.

description: Jira adapter profile for issue search, update, comment, and board workflows using Atlassian data-testid discovery, drawer/dialog recovery, and virtual board optimization metadata.
known_limitations: Workflow transitions that mutate issue state require governance confirmation.

description: Confluence adapter profile for page editing, commenting, search, and file preview workflows with Atlassian selector recovery and publish-dialog validation metadata.
known_limitations: Publishing or deleting pages requires governance approval.

description: Slack adapter profile for channel search, message compose, thread reply, and file preview workflows using data-qa discovery, no-duplicate-message safety, and virtualized message list metadata.
known_limitations: Sending messages or files requires separate action validation and duplicate prevention.

description: Notion adapter profile for page editing, database updates, search, and file preview workflows using block-aware discovery, keyboard-first recovery, and virtual table optimization metadata.
known_limitations: Database formulas and rollups are observed through browser-visible metadata only.

description: Figma adapter profile for canvas selection, comments, file navigation, and presentation workflows using visual region and canvas metadata with coordinate validation.
known_limitations: Design understanding and object semantics require separate vision reasoning and are out of scope.

description: Canva adapter profile for design editing, asset preview, presentation, and export dialog workflows using canvas, preview, visual-region, and aria-label recovery metadata.
known_limitations: Visual design critique and asset generation are out of browser-control scope.

description: Salesforce adapter profile for record search, record update, dashboard navigation, and report filters using Lightning metadata discovery, console tab awareness, and enterprise dashboard optimization metadata.
known_limitations: Record mutations require governance confirmation and visible record-context validation.

description: Detect OAuth and enterprise SSO flows, preserve session reuse metadata, and provide safe authentication recovery boundaries without automating CAPTCHA or credential entry.
known_limitations: Does not automate CAPTCHA solving or collect credentials.

description: Detect MFA and OTP prompts and emit handoff metadata for human completion while preserving replay and validation boundaries.
known_limitations: Does not retrieve, infer, or enter OTP codes automatically.

description: Detect and validate enterprise upload, download, preview, share, export, and attachment workflow surfaces without duplicating file operations.
known_limitations: Does not upload, download, or share without separate explicit action and validation.

description: Optional modular optimization framework that detects rich editors, large tables, virtualized UIs, enterprise dashboards, complex navigation, and long-running workflow signals for site adapters.
known_limitations: Provides browser-control optimization metadata only; it does not alter Planner Contract V2.

description: Builds a deterministic semantic page model from visible browser observations, collapsing wrappers and classifying inputs, buttons, links, cards, lists, dialogs, navigation, AI panels, ads, and search results.
known_limitations: Closed shadow roots and canvas-only controls remain outside semantic DOM extraction.

description: Maintains a structured browser runtime state model including URL, title, page type, tabs, frames, dialogs, downloads, uploads, authentication state, scroll state, focus, history, and pending actions.
known_limitations: Tab and history details depend on metadata supplied by the extension or execution gateway.

description: Generates selector IDs, ranks selector stability, validates selectors before planner use, and records recovery risk to prevent selector hallucination.
known_limitations: Runtime uniqueness validation requires a live browser execution context.

description: Declares expected outcomes for navigation, new tab, fill, click, upload, and download actions so false execution success can be detected deterministically.
known_limitations: This layer declares and evaluates state transitions; low-level Playwright execution remains owned by V4 Browser Control.

description: Provides an additive adapter framework where generic, search, jobs, GitHub, and documentation adapters expose semantic extraction rather than raw DOM.
known_limitations: DuckDuckGo and Brave adapters share the abstraction but are reserved for future provider-specific tuning.

description: Extracts organic external Google Search results with rank, title, description, displayed URL, explicit open URL, selector metadata, duplicate prevention, and AI Overview/ad/navigation exclusion.
known_limitations: Google markup changes may require adapter fixture refresh; live ranking remains owned by the search engine.

description: Tracks meaningful semantic DOM mutations, React/Vue/Angular rerenders, lazy loading, virtual DOM replacement, infinite scrolling, and asynchronous content changes to prevent stale page models.
known_limitations: Browser-side MutationObserver streaming is represented by semantic diffing until a live event channel is connected.

description: Plans semantic waits for page readiness, spinners, dialogs, tables, search results, uploads, downloads, React render completion, and infinite list stabilization.
known_limitations: Network idle is represented as a wait intent unless the execution gateway supplies live network events.

description: Maintains lightweight browser navigation memory for previous pages, redirects, login transitions, workflow checkpoints, recently interacted elements, search results, and opened tabs.
known_limitations: Memory is lightweight runtime memory; durable mission memory remains owned by V3/V5 systems.

description: Attempts deterministic recovery before replanning using original, stable, semantic, accessibility, text, nearby, similar, and adapter-assisted selector lookup.
known_limitations: Nearby geometric recovery requires bounding boxes from the extension to become fully spatial.

description: Fuses DOM, accessibility, screenshot-region metadata, OCR hooks, visual region hooks, and semantic page graph hints into unified semantic targets without invoking OCR or vision reasoning by default.
known_limitations: OCR and vision reasoning are metadata hooks only; no OCR engine is implemented in V4.6.

description: Monitors stale page models, repeated failures, selector instability, excessive retries, loop risk, navigation failures, responsiveness, and browser health score.
known_limitations: Responsiveness is inferred from Browser Intelligence state until low-level browser heartbeat events are connected.

description: Maintains deterministic mission progress, action history, browser state, loop detection, compact planner continuity context, replay frames, and active-mode replan vetoes for stalled workflows.
known_limitations: Mission checkpoint derivation is deterministic and generic; domain-specific decomposition remains outside V4.7.
